headline: Meta Declares War on the Cloud Giants, and Chip Stocks Pay the Price
summary: Meta's surprise move into cloud computing sent its shares up nearly 9% and rattled the neocloud upstarts, while chip stocks broadly retreated as Wall Street rotated into software. Michael Burry doubled down on his AI short, central bankers debated AI's uncertain economic impact at the ECB's Sintra forum, and oil eased further as US-Iran talks continued in Qatar.

headline: CPI FIM (BDL:ORCL) Stock May Be A Bargain On Earnings But Weak On Broader Checks
summary: CPI FIM has delivered a strong 93.6% return over the past five years, yet the current valuation checks lean cautious, with the stock recently down over shorter time frames and scoring poorly on several metrics. Around 93.6% total return over five years suggests CPI FIM has rewarded patient shareholders, even though the share price has been weak more recently. The long term story for the stock may hinge on whether CPI FIM can keep translating its assets into consistent cash flow. At the same...
